description_long: This object features a rectangular wooden base with a clear, vertically extending upper section that appears to be made of glass or acrylic. The wooden base is engraved with text and logos, including a Nike logo and geometric patterns, as well as a name and award details. The transparent upper portion is subtly decorated with floral or ornamental etchings, adding a decorative touch. The overall design is modern and minimalist, with clean lines and a smooth finish. The object is compact and appears to be a decorative lamp, likely intended for placement on a tabletop or desk. Its construction suggests a blend of natural wood and transparent material for both function and aesthetic appeal.
description: A modern lamp with a wooden base and a clear, etched glass or acrylic upper section, featuring engraved text and decorative patterns.
description_view_0: Front view shows the engraved name and award details on the wooden base, with the clear upper section displaying subtle floral etching.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the Nike logo and geometric pattern engraved on the wooden base, with the clear section above.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals additional engraved text on the wooden base and a partial view of the floral etching on the clear section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the plain wooden base and the clear upper section with visible floral etching, but no text or logos.
